Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 2. Analyze the Process: Start: Customer files an Insurance Claim (C). Step 1: Claim Registration (CR). Step 2: Document Verification (DV). Loop 1: If documents incomplete -> Re-Document Submission (RDS) -> back to DV. Step 3: Fraud Check (FC). Loop 2: If doubts raised -> In-depth Investigation (II) -> back to FC. End: Claim closed.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 3. Map to Petri Net Elements: Places (States): p_start: New claim arriving. p1: Ready for CR. p2: CR done, ready for DV. p3: DV done, ready for RDS (loop) or FC. Transitions (Activities): t_C: Insurance Claim. t_CR: Claim Registration. t_DV: Document Verification.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: 4. Refine Place/Transition Logic: Lets trace the arcs: p_start -> t_C -> p1. p1 -> t_CR -> p2. p2 -> t_DV -> p3. p3 -> t_RDS -> p2 (Loop 1). p3 -> t_FC -> p4. p4 -> t_II -> p3. p4 -> t_CA -> p5.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self-Correction on Loop 2: Is it better for t_II to go back to p3 (ready for FC) or just loop to itself? Going back to p3 makes sense... This implies a cycle of FC -> II -> FC -> II -> ... -> CA. So t_II -> p3 -> t_FC is highly accurate. Lets keep it as t_II -> p3.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: 5. Drafting the Code: Imports. Net creation. Places: p_start = PetriNet.Place(name=p_start). Transitions: t_C = PetriNet.Transition(name=t_C, label=Insurance Claim). Adding to net. Arcs using petri_utils.add_arc_from_to. Loops: p3 -> t_RDS -> p2. p4 -> t_II -> p3. Markings: im[p_start] = 1. fm[p_end] = 1.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: 6. Review against constraints: accepting Petri net -> Yes. places representing states -> Yes. transitions labeled -> Yes. arcs with loops -> Yes. between DV and RDS -> Yes. between FC and II -> Yes. initial marking start place -> Yes. final marking closed claim -> Yes.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 7. Final Code Structure: Double check the sequence: C CR DV RDS loops to DV FC II loops to FC CA AP P N CL. Matches the prompt exactly. The structure is solid. No edge cases missed.
